title: HEM Citronella Incense Sticks with JRose Holder - Pack of 120 Sticks - Natural Mosquito Repellent for Indoor and Outdoor Use
features: Natural Mosquito Repellent: Infused with citronella oil, these incense sticks effectively repel mosquitoes, making them perfect for both indoor and outdoor use.
Generous Pack: Includes 120 incense sticks, ensuring long-lasting use and excellent value.
Stylish Holder: Comes with a beautifully designed holder, adding an elegant touch to your decor while securely holding the incense sticks.
Calming Fragrance: Emits a soothing citronella aroma that creates a peaceful and relaxing atmosphere.
Versatile Use: Ideal for use during meditation, yoga, relaxation, or to simply enhance the ambiance of any room or outdoor space.
High-Quality: Made by HEM, a trusted brand known for its premium quality incense products.
Easy to Use: Light the tip of the incense stick, blow out the flame, and place it in the holder to enjoy hours of fragrant bliss.
description: Transform your living space into a serene sanctuary with HEM Citronella Incense Sticks, complete with a stylish holder. This pack contains 120 high-quality incense sticks, infused with natural citronella oil, known for its mosquito-repelling properties. Perfect for both indoor and outdoor use, these incense sticks create a calming atmosphere while effectively keeping mosquitoes at bay. Whether you're enjoying a peaceful evening in your garden or unwinding indoors, HEM Citronella Incense Sticks provide a delightful fragrance that enhances your environment. Ideal for meditation, relaxation, and creating a welcoming ambiance for guests.
